raw_transcript: It's the weirdest thing, Doctor. I'll have a normal day, then after dinner—especially if I have something greasy—I get this crushing pain right under my ribs on the right side. It even goes up into my right shoulder blade. It's so bad I can't catch my breath.
final_corrected_note: It's the weirdest thing, Doctor. I'll have a normal day, then after dinner—especially if I have something greasy—I get this crushing pain right under my ribs on the right side. It even goes up into my right shoulder blade. It's so bad I can't catch my breath.
